titleStmt.title: SII 9.710: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 710. (A.R. No. 70-A of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE RIGHT SIDE OF THE SOUTHERN ENTRANCE TO THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated in the cyclic year Hēmaḷambi, Jyēshṭha, ba. 8, Budhavāra, which in not verifiable. The Mahājanas of Bāguḷi are stated to have granted some land free of taxes to a certain Chika-Gau2ḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svasti . śrīmatu hēmaḷaṁbi
saṁvatsa(va)rada dvitīya jēṣṭa ba 8 budha
śrīmaddanādiyagrahāraṁ
bāguḷiyaśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷu
hosavora keṟeya keṁgāḍu mataru nā
lkumaṁ cikagauḍaṁge keṟemānya māḍida krama
veṁteṁdaḍe Amitagaṭṭe Ādiyāgi hirigeṟe
yoḷuvaraṁ baliṣṭamāḍi Ācaṁdrārkka
tāraṁbaraṁ nāvidagōsane yilla . Ī keyo
ḷage siriya maname taṁnobāgada ke
yi mattaroṁdu kaṁ baṁ nānuṟayvattumaṁ
vūru biṭṭa baḷanaṁ cikkagauḍaṁge tettu pha
lavuṁbanu . bācagauḍa hiriyakeṟege bi
ṭṭa dharmma kuḷiyālada keyi mattaru 2 keṟeyo
ḷagaṇa keyi mattaru 1 Āvalegaṁḍada gadde kaṁba
400 mādiya keṟeya gadde 400 yīraṇagadde
ya keyi mattaru 2 siṟilagēriya mane 2 tuḍi
ke voṁdu yiṁtinitumaṁ Ayvadiṁbaru cika
gauḍaṁge teṟemānyavāgi koṭṭa krama yeṁteṁda
ḍe keṟege voṁdu bhāga Ātaṁge yeraḍu bhāga
yiṁtī mariyāde Ācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ nā
vidagōsaneyilla . koṟeda revakeyya mēgaṇapaḍi
koḍalu gadyāṇa 14 keṟeya dharma
yoḍeya
Asagiyake Two more lines are completely damaged.
Digital edition of SII 9.710 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
